title: tylanthus brevifolius
intro: Tylanthus brevifolius, also known as the short-leaved tylanthus, is a plant species within the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, primarily for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Tylanthus brevifolius are said to include relief from fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, while also exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in folk remedies and traditional healing practices.
